seo.title: BotecoPro | Management for bars, restaurants, and Odoo-connected operations
seo.description: BotecoPro is Monynha Softwares' commercial platform for bars and restaurants with POS, inventory, billing, CRM, and Odoo-ready operations.

hero.kicker: Monynha Softwares product for food service
hero.title: Control service, inventory, billing, and operations in one unified flow.
hero.subtitle: BotecoPro connects dining room, counter, delivery, and back office for bars and restaurants that need to sell more with less operational friction.
hero.integrationFallbackDescription: Even while the integration backend is still being delivered, the website is already prepared with environment config, services, hooks, and safe fallbacks.
highlights: Reduce service time with orders organized by channel and shift.
Keep inventory and billing aligned with real operations instead of scattered spreadsheets.
Centralize commercial and operational indicators for faster decisions.

metrics.label: ticket uplift potential with guided upsell
for service, back office, and management

benefits.title: Benefits built for teams living the operation every day

items.title: Faster service
items.description: Coordinate queues, tables, counter orders, and delivery with less friction between staff, kitchen, and cashier.

items.title: Smarter inventory
items.description: Track consumption, replenishment, and waste with actionable data for purchasing and production.

items.title: Unified commercial management
items.description: Connect campaigns, loyalty, reporting, and billing in one business view.

solutions.title: Modules that solve real food service pain points
solutions.subtitle: Every BotecoPro module now supports operations, management, and growth with clearer product positioning.

items.title: Digital menu and ordering
items.description: Responsive menu with QR code, combos, shift-based highlights, and support for service teams.
bullets: Better mobile experience for guests and staff.

items.title: Purchasing and suppliers
items.description: Quotes, inbound deliveries, discrepancies, and replenishment forecasts in a more reliable operational flow.
bullets: More control over cost and stockouts.

items.title: Loyalty and CRM
items.description: Turn repeat service into relationship-driven growth with campaigns, cashback, segmentation, and automations.
bullets: Higher recurrence without relying only on discounts.
Useful indicators for sales and marketing teams.

items.title: Events and special operations
items.description: Plan reservations, seasonal actions, themed nights, and traffic peaks with checklists and operational visibility.
bullets: Clear workflows for staff and suppliers.

items.title: Integrations and data
items.description: Prepare your operation to connect POS, delivery, ERP, BI, and lead persistence without starting over later.
bullets: Ready structure for Odoo and Supabase.

odoo.title: Odoo integration is now a central part of the value proposition
odoo.description: Unify inventory, billing, POS, and data synchronization in a flow designed for real operations and safe expansion.
odoo.syncFallback: Connect the website to the Odoo backend through .env when the API is available.

items.title: Inventory management
items.description: Track sales consumption, recipes, and replenishment with a clearer view of what moved, what is missing, and what must be purchased.

items.title: Billing
items.description: Prepare orders for fiscal emission and financial reconciliation, reducing cashier and admin rework.

items.title: POS and operations
items.description: Organize on-site, counter, and delivery orders with data ready to consolidate in ERP and analyze by shift.

items.title: Data sync
items.description: Architecture prepared with hooks, services, mocks, and fallback flows so frontend evolution does not block backend maturity.

steps.title: Diagnosis and flow design
steps.description: We map service, inventory, billing, and critical integrations to prioritize measurable operational gains.

steps.title: Configuration by location and team
steps.description: We organize modules, permissions, initial data, and indicators around your daily routine.

steps.title: Rollout with continuous evolution
steps.description: The operation starts with safe fallbacks and a structure ready for integrations such as Odoo and Supabase-backed persistence.

testimonials.title: Operational proof, not generic marketing claims

quotes.text: We used to juggle cashier notes, WhatsApp, and spreadsheets. BotecoPro gave the team rhythm and gave management a clearer view of the business.
quotes.author: Rafaela Costa · Premium bar manager

quotes.text: The Odoo integration story mattered because we needed to connect operations, finance, and inventory in one reliable system.
quotes.author: Diego Martins · Multi-channel operations

quotes.text: Monynha approached this as a real product, not a template. The website now communicates value better and the product path feels more scalable.
quotes.author: Marcelo Santos · Monynha Softwares

items.question: Is BotecoPro only for bars?
items.answer: No. The product is positioned for bars, restaurants, and service-heavy food operations that need better control between front and back office.

items.question: Is the Odoo integration already live?
items.answer: The frontend is already prepared with environment-based configuration, services, hooks, and development fallback. API activation can happen as soon as the backend is available.

items.question: How are leads and forms persisted today?
items.answer: The project prioritizes Supabase when configured, supports an optional webhook, and keeps a safe local fallback for development and demos.

finalCta.title: Bring BotecoPro into a more predictable, scalable, and commercial operation.
finalCta.description: Talk to Marcelo Santos and the Monynha Softwares team to plan implementation, validate the Odoo integration path, and prioritize the next product milestones.
